title: Supervisor
description:
Job Summary

The Shop Supervisor is responsible for overseeing the daily operations of the hairdressing/barber shop, ensuring high-quality customer service, smooth workflow, and compliance with company standards. This role involves supervising staff, managing schedules, supporting sales targets, and maintaining a clean, safe, and professional shop environment.

Key Responsibilities

Operations & Customer Service

  • Oversee daily shop operations to ensure smooth and efficient workflow

  • Ensure excellent customer service and handle customer feedback or complaints professionally

  • Maintain shop cleanliness, hygiene, and safety standards at all times

  • Ensure compliance with company policies and relevant regulatory requirements

Staff Supervision & Management

  • Supervise hairstylists, barbers, and support staff

  • Prepare staff schedules, manage attendance, and ensure adequate staffing levels

  • Train and coach staff on service standards, customer service, and shop procedures

  • Monitor staff performance and provide feedback to management

Sales & Business Support

  • Support sales targets and promote services, packages, and retail products

  • Monitor daily sales, cash handling, and basic reporting

  • Assist with stock control, ordering of supplies, and inventory checks

Administrative Duties

  • Prepare daily or weekly reports as required

  • Coordinate with management on staffing needs, promotions, and operational issues

  • Assist with onboarding of new staff when required

Requirements

  • Minimum 5-7 years of experience in a hairdressing or barber shop environment

  • Prior supervisory or team lead experience preferred

  • Ability to work weekends, public holidays, and shift hours

  • Familiarity with hygiene and safety standards in the grooming industry

hiringCompany.description:
Profyle Studios is a top rated hair salon in Singapore serving the Serangoon area, we offer a full range of hair care services, including Hair Coloring, Hair Perms, Hair Rebonding, Keratin Hair Treatments, Scalp Treatments. We utilize premium Japanese products such as Lebel, Mucota, and Tokio Inkarami. 


With our emphasis on proven techniques and quality products, we follow a meticulous process involving Consultations, Transparent Communication, Personalized Service, and Follow-Up Care. 


This ensures outstanding hair styling services and ultimate customer satisfaction. Experience The Profyle Studios' Experience today
